_comment: Official Atlassian remote MCP server (covers Confluence AND Jira) — http + OAuth. NO read-only flag: read-only is enforced by the connected account's permissions (see SETUP.md). This is the SAME endpoint as the jira bundle; if Jira is already enabled you can reuse one server entry for both. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
